functions.name: deploy-fine-tuning-workflow
functions.description: Deploy Fine-Tuning pipeline — provision Azure ML workspace, prepare JSONL training data, configure LoRA, submit training job, deploy fine-tuned model. Use when: deploy, provision, train.

functions.name: evaluate-fine-tuning-workflow
